task_completion.description: Verify the creation of a Notable hash set named 'Intel_Targets'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy 'Hash Sets' settings/options window showing 'Intel_Targets' listed as a hash set, ideally with its type set to 'Notable' or 'Known Bad'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the forensic case 'Target_Hunting_2024' with case number 'INV-TGT-009'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy main window showing the case name 'Target_Hunting_2024' in the title bar or case dashboard, and 'INV-TGT-009' visible in the case details.

task_completion.description: Verify the disk image ntfs_undel.dd was added as a data source and analyzed with the Hash Lookup module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy tree view showing 'ntfs_undel.dd' under Data Sources, and evidence of the Hash Lookup ingest module having been run (e.g., ingest progress bar or ingest module settings).

task_completion.description: Verify that hash set hits for 'Intel_Targets' were successfully identified in Autopsy.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy tree view expanded under 'Results' -> 'Hashset Hits' showing the 'Intel_Targets' category with files listed in the result viewer pane.

task_completion.description: Verify the resulting hit files were extracted to /home/ga/Reports/Hit_Exports/.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An Autopsy 'Save As'/'Extract' dialog pointing to /home/ga/Reports/Hit_Exports/, or a file manager/terminal window showing the extracted files residing in that specific directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the summary report target_hit_report.txt is created with the required formatting.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal displaying the contents of /home/ga/Reports/target_hit_report.txt, containing 'CASE_NUMBER: INV-TGT-009', 'TOTAL_HITS: <N>', and lines formatted as 'HIT: <filename> | <md5_hash>'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Autopsy GUI to perform the forensic tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the Autopsy graphical interface being actively used (menus, dialogs, tree views) rather than the agent just writing scripts or using CLI tools to bypass the Autopsy requirement.

integrity.description: Verify the agent extracted the actual files from the Autopsy interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the right-click context menu 'Extract File(s)' being used on the hash set hits within Autopsy, rather than the agent manually copying files from the raw image using terminal commands.

integrity.description: Verify the report contains actual filenames and hashes derived from the Autopsy analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: The filenames and hashes visible in the target_hit_report.txt must match the actual hits displayed in the Autopsy GUI's result viewer.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Case Name: Target_Hunting_2024. Case Number: INV-TGT-009. Disk Image: /home/ga/evidence/ntfs_undel.dd. Intel File: /home/ga/evidence/intel_hashes.txt. Export Directory: /home/ga/Reports/Hit_Exports. Report File: /home/ga/Reports/target_hit_report.txt. Note: The target hashes are dynamically sampled from the disk image at runtime, so the specific filenames and hashes in the report will vary per run, but they must exactly match the hits found by Autopsy.
